# Goa Automation

> Goa Automation is a proprietorship firm based in Verna Industrial Estate, Goa, India. We specialize in electrical panel building, service & maintenance, and industrial trading of machine electrical components. ISO 9001:2015 certified. We work B2B with manufacturing, pharmaceutical, FMCG, telecom, and water-treatment companies across Goa.

## Services
- Electrical Panel Building: MCC panels, PCC panels, VFD drive panels, control panels, distribution boards, built to IS/IEC standards.
- Service & Maintenance: AMC contracts, fault diagnosis, preventive maintenance, rewiring.
- Industrial Trading: Contactors, relays, circuit breakers, PLCs, sensors, switchgear, cable & conduit — genuine branded components from Siemens, Schneider Electric, ABB, L&T, Havells, Phoenix Contact, Omron, Mitsubishi, Delta, Legrand.

## Contact
- Phone / WhatsApp: +91 9168547043

- Working Hours: Monday–Saturday, 9:00 AM – 5:30 PM
